Learning Roadmap

12-week plan · Targeting Google SWE L4+

Overall Progress
0/6 phases
0 completed1 in progress5 upcoming
Week 1–2Current

Foundation

High Priority
Data Structures & Algorithms review
LeetCode Easy problems (20 problems)
Review time/space complexity
Week 3–4

Core DSA

High Priority
Arrays, Strings, Hashmaps
Trees and Graphs
LeetCode Medium (30 problems)
Week 5–6

Advanced DSA

High Priority
Dynamic Programming
Greedy Algorithms
LeetCode Hard (15 problems)
Week 7–8

System Design

Medium Priority
Distributed systems fundamentals
Design: URL shortener, Twitter
Study: CAP theorem, consistent hashing
Week 9–10

Go & Cloud Native

Medium Priority
Go fundamentals (goroutines, channels)
Kubernetes basics
gRPC + Protobuf
Week 11–12

Mock Interviews

High Priority
Pramp / interviewing.io sessions
Behavioral STAR answers
Company-specific prep

Complete this roadmap to unlock your Google-ready profile
